MetricDataQueries.description: The metric queries to be returned. A single GetMetricData call can include as many as 500 MetricDataQuery structures.

StartTime.description: The time stamp indicating the earliest data to be returned.

EndTime.description: The time stamp indicating the latest data to be returned.

NextToken.description: Include this value if it was returned by the previous GetMetricData operation.

ScanBy.description: The order in which data points should be returned.

MaxDatapoints.description: The maximum number of data points the request should return before paginating.
